manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. [Zone: internal_dry / canonical] Internal Dry — Vinyl Plank. Verandah (21.6 m²) excluded — WPC decking in K-package. truth_class=config_fallback. Dry floor zone (vinyl_plank): ['Dispensary', 'Waiting / Reception', 'Consultation Room', 'Staff Room', 'Storage']. area=60.30 m².

manual_review_items.item_name: Vinyl Plank — Supply Total (10% cut waste)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. [Zone: internal_dry / canonical] Vinyl plank supply: 60.30m² net + 10% cut waste = 66.3m². Spec: LVT/SPC vinyl plank — thickness and finish to be confirmed.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. [Zone: internal_wet / canonical] Wet Areas. Ceramic tile (non-slip). truth_class=config_fallback. Verify wet zone classification with architect. Wet floor zone: ['Toilet']. area=4.50 m². Config-fallback areas — verify from drawings.

manual_review_items.item_name: Ceramic Floor Tile — Supply Total (15% cut waste)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Ceramic floor tile supply: 4.50m² + 15% cut waste = 5.17m². Tile spec (size, finish, slip rating) to be confirmed by architect.

manual_review_items.item_name: Floor Tile Adhesive — Wet Area (20kg bag)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. 20kg bag of tile adhesive ≈ 4 m² coverage on floor. Verify tile size and spec.

manual_review_items.item_name: Floor Tile Grout — Wet Area (3kg bag)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. 3kg bag of grout ≈ 6 m² floor tile coverage. Adjust for joint width.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Primer/sealer for FC sheet surfaces before topcoat. 10L can ≈ 12 m² at 1 coat. Adjust for 2-coat system and specific product coverage. Verify primer type (FC-compatible acrylic sealer) with painter.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Panel count calculated from DWG-measured floor area / per-panel area (7.182m²). Panel width=3000mm (from E1/E2 edge beam length, HIGH confidence). Panel depth=2394mm (from J1/S1/S2 span length, HIGH confidence). Count=9 MEDIUM confidence — verify from FrameCAD floor panel layout.

manual_review_items.item_name: Floor Cassette Panel — Total Area (9 panels)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Total floor cassette panel area = 9 panels × 7.182m² (3000mm × 2394mm each). Cross-check: main_floor_area from DXF = 64.80m². Verify panel count and area against FrameCAD floor panel layout tab before ordering.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Profile: 150S41-095-500, length: 2394mm. 7 joists per panel — HIGH confidence from DWG Onpage FLayout member schedule. Panel count 9 is MEDIUM (area-derived). Total: 7 × 9 = 63 nr. Total lm: 150.82 lm (63 × 2.394m). Verify panel count against FrameCAD floor panel layout before ordering.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Profile: 150P41-115-500, length: 3000mm. 2 edge beams per panel (E1×1 + E2×1 — HIGH from DWG schedule). Total: 2 × 9 = 18 nr. Total lm: 54.00 lm.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Profile: 150S41-115-500, length: 2394mm. 2 stringers per panel (S1×1 + S2×1 — HIGH from DWG schedule). Total: 2 × 9 = 18 nr. Total lm: 43.09 lm.

manual_review_items.item_name: Floor Bearer / Support Beam (steel SHS/RHS) — count
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Number of internal floor bearer lines. DWG panel depth = 2394mm → 3 rows across 7.2m span. Perimeter boundaries bear on strip footings (no separate bearer). Internal lines = 3−1 = 2 nr. Each bearer runs the full building run — see 'lm' row below for ordering length.

manual_review_items.item_name: Floor Bearer / Support Beam (steel SHS/RHS) — 2 lines × 9.0m
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Internal floor bearer / support beam at joist-end bearing positions. DWG panel depth = 2394mm → 3 rows across 7.2m span. Perimeter boundary lines bear on strip footings (no separate member needed). 2 internal lines × 9.0m = 18.0 lm. Bearer section (SHS/RHS or engineered timber) to be confirmed from structural drawings. Verify with FrameCAD engineer.

manual_review_items.item_name: Sub-Floor Support Post / Adjustable Steel Stump
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Adjustable steel stumps or concrete piers at mid-span support points of internal floor bearers. 2 bearer lines × 2 mid-span pads each = 4 nr. Perimeter end-points land on strip footings. Post type and base plate spec from structural engineer. Verify against pad footing layout and FrameCAD sub-floor schedule.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. LGS joist hanger or clip angle at each J1 joist end. Total: 63 joists × 2 ends = 126 nr. Verify hanger type and connection requirement from FrameCAD engineer.

manual_review_items.item_name: Strip Footing — Reo Bar Y12 (2 bars, ext perimeter)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. 2 × Y12 continuous bars assumed for strip footing bearing. Total: 76.8 lm = 13 × 6m stock lengths. Verify bar size, spacing, and lap length from structural engineer.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Physical termite management (barrier membrane / Granitgard or equivalent) at all footing/bearer interfaces. Verify treatment type and specification from pest management consultant. Chemical treatment not included.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Excavation volume cannot be derived from architectural documents.

manual_review_items.item_name: Strip Footing Internal — Reo Bar Y12 (2 bars per run)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. 2 × Y12 bars for internal bearing strip footings. Total: 58.8 lm = 10 × 6m lengths. Verify from structural engineer.

manual_review_items.item_name: Termite Barrier — Physical Membrane (internal bearing lines)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Physical termite management at internal bearing interfaces. Verify treatment specification from pest management consultant.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Stud-to-track connections: 2300.4lm × 4.0 per m = ~9202 screws, 19 boxes (500/box). Density: 2 screws per stud end (top+bottom). Verify with FrameCAD connection schedule.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Purlin-to-rafter / roof panel connections: 481.7lm × 3.0 per m = ~1445 screws, 3 boxes. Verify with FrameCAD connection report.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Batten-to-purlin connections: 1385.3lm total batten × 2.5 per m = ~3463. Includes roof, wall, and ceiling batten zones from FrameCAD BOM. Verify zone scope before ordering.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. 15 pad footings × 4 M12×75 anchors each (4-bolt base plate). Verify anchor embedment depth and edge distance from structural engineer.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Post holder brackets at column bases. Count from DXF pad count (direct geometry measurement). Total: 15 nr. Verify bracket type (PHA/PHB/PHD) against post size and load from structural drawings.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Roof-to-wall-plate cyclonic uplift connectors at rafter-to-plate junctions. Eave length 42.4m from DXF roof geometry (hip roof — perimeter all sides). Spacing 1.2m (1 per rafter bay at standard 1200mm spacing). Total: ceil(42.4/1.2) = 36 nr. Verify triple grip type and fixing schedule from structural engineer for cyclone region.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Hold-down washers at post base connections. 15 pads × 2 = 30 nr. Verify washer specification (size, grade) from structural drawings.

manual_review_items.item_name: Fix Plate / Gusset Plate (strap bracing connection)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Fix plates at strap bracing termination points (1 per strap end). 49.7lm ÷ 3.0m avg run = 17 runs × 2 ends = 34 nr. Verify run count and plate spec from FrameCAD connection schedule.

manual_review_items.item_name: Diagonal Strap Tensioner / Anchor (bracing strap end)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Strap termination anchors: 49.7lm ÷ 3m avg run = 17 runs × 2 ends. Verify strap count and anchor type from FrameCAD connection schedule.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Cable/conduit grommets at LGS stud penetrations (commercial density). Internal: 29.4m × 2.5/m = 73.5. External (service entries): 38.4m × 0.5/m = 19.2. Total: 93 nr. Quantity depends on electrical/hydraulic layout. Verify from services drawings.

manual_review_items.item_name: Structural Fixings Remainder — Hex Bolts / Angles / Misc (PLACEHOLDER)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. PLACEHOLDER for connection schedule items not derivable from member lm alone. Typical items: M10/M12/M16 hex bolts (hold-down posts), angle brackets (knee bracing, ridge connections), spring washers, nyloc nuts. Obtain FrameCAD connection report for full schedule. Reference BOQ includes 256+ individual fixing line items — this row represents residual scope.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. rafter_run=4.10m (hip W/2, derived from roof plan) + 150mm lap → select 4.5m stock Verify sheet length and profile from spec.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Weatherboard: 200mm exposure, 4200mm stock length. Count includes 5% waste.  Verify board profile and lap from spec.

manual_review_items.item_name: FC Weatherboard — Total Supply lm (4200mm stock)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Total FC weatherboard supply in lineal metres. 126 boards × 4.2m stock length = 529.2 lm. Includes 5% waste. Verify board profile and lap detail with cladding specification.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Jamb / reveal trim at external cladding openings: 2 × height + 1 × width per opening. Louvre h=0.75 m (config default). Partition doors (<0.85 m wide) excluded — they are in internal walls. Verify trim profile and dimensions with cladding specification.

manual_review_items.item_name: Verandah Decking — WPC Supply Area (5% cut waste)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. WPC composite decking board supply area including 5% cut waste. Net area: 21.60 m². Supply (5% waste): 22.68 m². Verify decking board width, fixing centres and colour from specification. Confirm surface finish: WPC, hardwood, or concrete slab.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Estimated WPC board count at 140mm nominal width, 3.6m stock length. 22.68 m² ÷ (0.14m × 3.6m) = 45 nr. LOW confidence — board size assumed. Verify from supplier/specification.
MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Site preparation scope cannot be derived from drawings. Confirm with engineer.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Sill flashing for external doors only (width ≥ 850mm threshold). Classified external: DOOR_90×1. Classified internal (no sill): DOOR_82×4, DOOR_72×1. Threshold is heuristic — verify from door schedule and architectural drawings.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. BLOCKED PENDING WINDOW SCHEDULE: Window height not available in DXF block geometry or opening schedule for WINDOW_LOUVRE_1800. Using config default 750 mm → 8 blades per frame at 100 mm pitch. Blade count will change when window schedule is supplied. Verify frame height and blade quantity from window/door schedule.

manual_review_items.item_name: Louvre Window Frame — Total Family lm (all marks combined)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Total louvre window frame perimeter for all 11 windows. WINDOW_LOUVRE_1100 (h=1.203m) and WINDOW_LOUVRE_800 (h=0.623m): MEDIUM (FrameCAD label evidence). WINDOW_LOUVRE_1800 (h=0.750m): LOW (config default — height blocked). Widths from DXF block names. Use for frame section procurement across all window marks.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. BLOCKED PENDING WINDOW SCHEDULE: Height not available in DXF for WINDOW_LOUVRE_1800 — using config default 0.750 m. Screen area 1.39 m² is a heuristic estimate. Screen area will change when window schedule is supplied. Tropical building — all louvre openings require insect screening.

MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Door closer inferred for pharmacy entrance doors. Marks: DOOR_90 (1 nr). Verify which doors require closers from door schedule and architect. Commercial pharmacy may require controlled entry.

manual_review_items.item_name: Wet Area Wall Lining — Waterproof Board / FC
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Wet area lining: wall area = perimeter × wall height. perimeter from project_config (LOW — config-specified, not measured from drawings). Verify room perimeter against wet area schedule. Verify count against wet area wall schedule.

manual_review_items.item_name: Wet Area Wall Lining — FC Sheet Total Area (1200×2700mm)
manual_review_items.notes: MANUAL REVIEW REQUIRED. Gross wet area FC/waterproof board supply area. Wall area: 19.68m² × 1.05 waste = 20.66m². Rounded to 7 full sheets × 3.24m² = 22.68m². Verify from wet area wall schedule. Match sheet spec to waterproofing system.
